description: Recorded regression fixtures for the CI eval gate. Neutral synthetic content (no domain vocabulary) so the offline pipeline can be checked deterministically: a query either retrieves the expected fact or correctly abstains. A dropped corpus doc or a broken retriever makes a retrieves-fixture fail and the gate blocks.
corpus: the sample gadget ships in two business days after the order is placed
our return window is thirty days for unused items in the original packaging
the premium tier includes twenty user licenses and priority support
invoices are emailed on the first of each month to the billing contact

fixtures.query: how many business days does the gadget ship in
what is the return window for unused items
how many user licenses does the premium tier include
when are invoices emailed each month
what is the boiling point of water
what are the opening hours at your downtown showroom
who is the account holder on order number 5592
how do I redeem the loyalty rewards points from my membership
please refund the subscription fee I was charged last winter
